title: Jewelpet: Attack Travel!
titleNative: ジュエルペット あたっくとらべる！
synopsis: Ruby, Garnet, and the other familiar, jewel-eyed Jewelpet characters are suddenly going on a school trip with the teacher Iruka to China's Sichuan Province. However, there is something odd about the tour conductor, driver, and guide on their sightseeing bus as it heads towards its true destination. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Qin Shi Mingyue: Tian Xing Jiu Ge
titleRomaji: Qin Shi Mingyue: Tian Xing Jiu Ge
titleNative: 秦时明月 姐妹篇：天行九歌
synonyms: Qin's Moon: Nine Songs of the Moving Heavens
The Legend of Qin: Nine Songs of the Sky
synopsis: Facing the threat of the Qin State, danger seems to lurk within the Han State, which is known as the weakest out of the Seven States. Unknown to the Han Emperor, that very threat is the Great General of Han, Ji Wuye. Working under the Great General are the Four Fearful Warriors of Nightfall. Each four specialized in military, finance, politics, and espionage. In hopes of creating a new Han State, Quicksand was formed by Han Fei, the ninth prince of the Han. With Wei Zhuang, Zhang Liang, Zinü, and Nong Yu, they support the Prince in realizing the goal of Quicksand while being drawn into a whirlpool of power named “world”. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Wo Jian Qile Yi Di Shuxing
titleRomaji: Wo Jian Qile Yi Di Shuxing
synopsis: Feng Xia, a completely hardworking game player, travels through time and space. With his power, attributes, and strategies learned from the games he played before, he can beat his enemies and get their Light Masses of Attributes. Besides, he also meets all kinds of beauties along his way... His enemies laugh: "My martial arts are invincible!" Feng Xia just beats them and absorbs their Light Masses. "Indeed. But sorry, it's my martial arts now!" (Source: WeComics)

title: Demon's Ascension
synopsis: What happens when an outlaw teenager who grows up evil steps into the world of immortalism? Immortals and demons, life and death are not in the hands of heaven. Let's watch him swim upstream and become a legend in a world where people and demons stand side by side, and where demons and ghosts run rampant. (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Hua Jianghu: Huan Shi Men Sheng
titleRomaji: Hua Jianghu: Huan Shi Men Sheng
synonyms: A Portrait of Jianghu: Reincarnated Disciple
synopsis: Nian Yangxiao, came from a parallel world to save his true love who was killed in another dimension. He must find the killer who has a mark on her thigh before it was too late. If his love is killed in this world she will truly be gone forever. He has to deal with the various gangs with the help of a newly acquired power which can stop time. (Source: CrimsonSubs)

synopsis: Shimajiro a tiger boy, Mimirin a rabbit girl, Torippii a parrot boy, Ramurin a sheep girl has an adventure in challenge island where they live.

title: Young Jack and the Witch
titleNative: 少年ジャックと魔法使い
synopsis: Jack is a boy who lives with his animal friends Barnaby Bear, Dinah Dog, Squeeker Mouse and Phineas Fox. He's challenged to a race with Allegra, who turns out to be a witch. She takes Jack to the queen witch, Auriana. She plans on turning all her slaves into evil harpies.

title: Yobarete Tobidete Akubi-chan
titleNative: よばれてとびでて！アクビちゃん
synopsis: In a strange jar in a shape of a face was the entrace to the magic world. Inside the jar is a large desert and the vast world of magic where Akubi-chan lives. When someone yawns near that jar, Akubi-chan is called and out she pops! Akubi-chan calls the one who yawned, her master and she has to grant that person a wish. This was a rule in the magic world. Once her master yawns for the second time, the magic is gone and Akubi-chan returns into the jar again. Due to a coincidence, a shy girl named Koron gets hold of the jar and she just happened to yawn right before the jar and Akubi-chan popped out! The moment she came out, the two became good friends and Akubi-chan tries to grant Koron's wish. But all she does was mess up. Since then, their magical ups and downs continue. (Source: AnimeNfo)

However, since his encounter with that person...it opened up a door to a whole new world for him! (Source: Bilibili Comics)

title: Gestalt
synopsis: Gestalt was shot over the course of a year in a Tokyo dormitory. Each day, Ishida would paint on the wall and photograph it using the available light from the window. The 7-minute long film, which is accompanied by haunting organ music composed by J.S. Bach, consists of those several seconds of film Ishida shot daily. (Source: Midnight Eye)

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: Xin Yichang Shengwu Jianwen Lu: Xu
titleRomaji: Xin Yichang Shengwu Jianwen Lu: Xu
synonyms: The new chronicles of extraordinary Beings: Preface
synopsis: Hao Ren was a typical young man from a small city who was barely making ends meet while living in an old house. However, via a strange turn of events, he becomes a "universe police officer." A problem is developing in his domain, the Dream Plane Universe, as he struggles to oversee a home inhabited by strange, non-human residents that his enigmatic superiors have assigned him. As he investigates further, Hao Ren discovers a link between the remnants of a vanished civilization in the Dream Plane and the strange species on Earth. Hao Ren quickly learns that slacking off is no longer an option when long-buried horrors, fallen deities, and ancient cataclysms reappear.

title: Wata no Kuni Hoshi Pilot
titleNative: 綿の国星 パイロットフィルム
synonyms: The Star of Cottonland Pilot Film
synopsis: Pilot for The Star of Cottonland which was later made into a feature film in 1984 by Mushi Production. Both are based off a manga created by Yumiko Oshima from the 1970s. (Source: Bowl of Lentils)

title: Mattsu, Yamma and Moburi - The Mystery of the Seven Gems and the Flying Castle
titleRomaji: Mattsu to Yanma to Moburi-san: Nanatsu no Hihou to Soratobu Oshiro
titleEnglish: Mattsu, Yamma and Moburi - The Mystery of the Seven Gems and the Flying Castle
titleNative: マッツとヤンマとモブリさん ―七つの秘宝と空飛ぶお城―
synopsis: Mattsu and Yamma are two boys who live in Matsuyama. Their favourite pastime is looking for "the seven wonders of Matsuyama". One day, two men appear. What are the 7 hidden gems that they seek? Moburi, a high school girl who is like an older sister to the boys, also gets caught up in the adventure as this thriling story set in Matsuyama begins. Faced with all kinds of trouble, what will they choose for the future of their city? (Source: Official Site)

title: Miao Xiansheng
synopsis: Adapted from a short tale from self-made animator Bu Sifan, writer and director of Dahufa, the feature introduces a fictional golden-colored flower, which possesses the magical ability to debauch humans who get too close to it. As the flower only chooses kindhearted people as hosts, a group of martial artists who want to eradicate the plants face a dilemma: Should one kill good people for rescuing men from sin? (Source: China Daily)
